data.title: Reliability
data.description: WhatsApp is recognized for delivering reliable communication services.
data.technical_spec: Robust architecture with redundant systems ensures uptime.

data.title: Privacy-Focused
data.description: Commitment to privacy is a core brand attribute.
data.technical_spec: End-to-end encryption and minimal data retention policies.

data.title: Global Reach
data.description: A universal communication app with a wide international footprint.
data.technical_spec: Available in diverse languages and supports multiple regional networks.

data.title: User-Centric Design
data.description: Design choices are driven by user experience and satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Regular updates based on user feedback and usage analysis.

data.title: Innovation Leadership
data.description: Pioneering new communication features and technology adoption.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates features like voice/video calls and status updates.
